parameters:
Good morning, sir. Unfortunately, the young master has just finished his meal and
left. I believe he is nearby... but please, do not disturb him.

Master, not even coming for dinner at night... Are you really alright...? I haven't
seen you at all lately, perhaps........

...Do not pry too deeply. You are the young master's personal maid, are you not? Your
only concern should be satisfying the young master.
